hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
prompt = data.get('prompt', '')
has_chinese = any('一' <= c <= '鿿' for c in prompt)
if has_chinese:
    msg = ('The user is learning English while coding in this project. After your main response, add a short section titled \"English Corner\" with: (1) a natural English translation of their Chinese input; (2) 2-3 coding or technical English words/phrases relevant to this task, each with a one-line example; (3) if their input were already in English, one tiny note on phrasing. Keep it concise and encouraging.')
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'UserPromptSubmit', 'additionalContext': msg}}))
"
